submission.implementation_notes: HTLC validator variant built on a zero-cost, Cont-style early-termination Validator monad (Plinth.Validator): decode-or-abort steps and boolean guards sequenced into a flat, short-circuiting do-chain that compiles to zero overhead. Each ScriptContext/datum/TxInfo field is decoded at most once, only when a guard reaches it; values that are merely compared are never structurally decoded. Source: lib/HTLC/Monadic.hs + lib/Plinth/Validator.hs in plinth-cape-submissions @ 616fe5da245e8478aec9a1e2fcbac652893f2313. Per-module inliner tuning inline-unconditional-growth=110 (cost optimum for this tree).
